2dfab983.goal: Analyze stock market trends for AAPL

plan.goal: Analyze stock market trends for AAPL

sub_tasks.title: Gather historical stock data
sub_tasks.description: Fetch historical stock prices and relevant financial data for AAPL from a reliable API or database.

sub_tasks.title: Analyze trends using statistical methods
sub_tasks.description: Use Python libraries like pandas and matplotlib to analyze the data, identify patterns, and visualize trends.

sub_tasks.title: Synthesize findings and present insights
sub_tasks.description: Summarize key trends, provide confidence scores for predictions, and draft a report with actionable insights.

plan.final_output: A detailed report on the current and predicted stock market trends for AAPL

completed_tasks.title: Gather historical stock data

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.role_description: Reviews code for errors, inconsistencies, and potential issues; makes decisions on what changes to retain or discard.

agents.name: Change Manager
agents.role_description: Manages the process of committing or discarding uncommitted changes across all files, ensuring codebase stability and maintainability.

agents.name: Committer/Reverter
agents.role_description: Implements the necessary commits or reverts to bring the project up-to-date, based on decisions made by the Code Reviewer.

agents.name: Documentation Writer
agents.role_description: Creates documentation for the implemented solution, ensuring clarity and maintainability for future development.
